hints: Complemento: el Taj Mahal durante sus vacaciones
hintDisplay: Sujeto: ella / Verbo: visitar (resultado futuro probable) / Complemento: el Taj Mahal durante sus vacaciones / Tiempo: si pierde su pasaporte

correctSentence: If she loses her passport, she will not visit the Taj Mahal during her vacation

hints: Complemento: al aeropuerto sin su pasaporte
hintDisplay: Sujeto: ella / Verbo: llegar (will arrive) / Complemento: al aeropuerto sin su pasaporte / Tiempo: si pierde su pasaporte

correctSentence: If she loses her passport, she will arrive at the airport without important documents.

correctSentence: If the passengers don't confirm in time, they won't have a reservation at the hotel.
